name: Holiday Eggnog Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs, sugar, nutmeg and margarine; press onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
2. Soften gelatin in water; stir over low heat until dissolved.
3. Combine cream cheese and sugar, at medium speed on electric mixer until well blended.
4. Gradually add gelatin and eggnog, mixing until blended.
5. Chill until slightly thickened; fold in whipped cream.
6. Pour over crust; chill until firm.
VARIATION:
Ingrease 1/3 cup Sugar. Substitute milk for eggnog. Add 1 teaspoon Vanilla and 3/4 teaspoon Rum Extract. Continue as directed.
